start.speaker: The Arbor
start.text: The shade is cool and the climb is long. Surely you have earned a moment. Sit. Close your eyes. The summit will still be there...

text_variants.text: You are so tired. No one would blame you. Lie back in the cool shade; the summit can wait an hour, or two, or until morning...
text_variants.text_zh: 你太累了，没人会怪你。靠进这清凉的树荫里；山顶等一个钟头、两个钟头、或等到天亮，都不迟……

choices.text: Lie down and rest a while. (Comfort now.)
choices.text_zh: 躺下歇一会儿。（此刻的安逸。）

choices.text: Rise and keep climbing. Rest is sweeter at the summit.
choices.text_zh: 起身，继续攀登。山顶的歇息更甘甜。

start.text_zh: 树荫清凉，山路漫长。你总该歇一歇了。坐下吧，闭上眼——山顶又不会跑……

rested.text: You sink into the arbor's cushions. When you stir, the light has shifted and your watchfulness has leaked away.

choices.text: (Wake, a little later than you meant to.)

rested.text_zh: 你陷进凉亭的软垫里。等你回过神，天光已偏移，警醒也悄悄漏走了。

rose.text: You set your face to the slope again. The shade falls behind, and the summit light seems a fraction nearer.
rose.text_zh: 你重新面向坡道。树荫被甩在身后，山顶的光仿佛近了一分。
